title: LGBTQ2+ Helplines * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > LGBTQ2+ Helplines * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter LGBTQ2+ Youth Older Adults Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL AND TRANSGENDER NATIONAL HELP CENTER LGBT NATIONAL SENIOR HOTLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hotline for gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender older adults to talk with trained peer-counselor volunteers about issues including isolation, relationship concerns, bullying, HIV/AIDS, etc. 2261 Market Street #296 San Francisco, CA 94114 Eligibility: Age 50 and older who identify as gay, lesbian, bisexual, and transgender Hours: Monday-Friday 11am-8pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (888) 234-7243 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
